omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Your profile information. You give us information when you register your account on the Platform, including your username, password, gender, date of birth, email address, mobile number, and/or photograph, and any other information you disclose in your account profile.

Your profile information. You give us information when you register your account on the Platform, including your username, password, gender, date of birth, email address, mobile number, and/or photograph, and any other information you disclose in your account profile.

Your purchase information. When you make a purchase or payment on the Platform, we collect information about the purchase or payment transaction, such as items you purchased, your payment card information or your payment information through other electronic payment methods available on the Platform ("Payment Provider"), your order, billing, delivery, and contact information.

Your profile information. You give us information when you register your account on the Platform, including your username, password, gender, date of birth, email address, mobile number, and/or photograph, and any other information you disclose in your account profile.

Your purchase information. When you make a purchase or payment on the Platform, we collect information about the purchase or payment transaction, such as items you purchased, your payment card information or your payment information through other electronic payment methods available on the Platform ("Payment Provider"), your order, billing, delivery, and contact information.

Location Information. We collect information about your approximate location, including location information based on your SIM card and/or IP address. With your permission, we may also collect precise location data (such as GPS).
